name: skill-price
description: Estimates a fair market price for a Claude Code skill (.md file) based on token usage, install count, active users, rating, and category. Returns token count, per-use cost, monthly cost projection, individual signal multipliers, and a suggested subscription price tier. Call this when a user asks how much to charge for a skill, wants to price a prompt file, or needs to understand the token cost of a Claude skill.

functionDefinition.name: skill-price
functionDefinition.description: Estimate a fair market price for a Claude Code skill file. Factors in token count (base cost), install count (demand), active users (retention), star rating (quality), and category. Returns suggested price tier (Free → $19.99/mo), cost per use, monthly cost, and per-signal multipliers. Call when the user wants to price or value a skill.md file.

content.description: Full text content of the skill.md file to analyze

installs.description: Total number of installs the skill has received. Use 0 if unknown or unpublished.

active_30d.description: Number of users who used the skill in the last 30 days. Use 0 if unknown.

rating.description: Average star rating (1.0–5.0). Use 3.0 if unknown.

category.description: Skill category. Affects price multiplier — productivity and finance command higher prices.

model.description: Model the skill runs on. Affects per-token cost. Defaults to claude-sonnet-4-6.

uses_per_month.description: Estimated monthly invocations for cost projection. Defaults to 1000.
